scenes.dialogue: The difference between mediocre AI output and something that makes your jaw drop is not the model. It is not the subscription. It is six words you chose differently.
scenes.direction: Close-up, direct to camera. Confident, warm, slightly playful. Pause after 'six words.'

scenes.dialogue: Write me something about dogs. That is what most people type. And then they wonder why the output is boring.
scenes.visual: Split screen cinematic: left side shows generic text appearing on a cold screen, right side shows a golden retriever in warm sunlight — the gap between generic and specific, clinical vs alive

scenes.dialogue: Think of it this way. An AI is a world-class chef. It can cook anything. But if you walk into the kitchen and say make me food, you are going to get something random. Give it a recipe — the ingredients, the technique, the plating — and you get a Michelin-star meal. The prompt is the recipe.
scenes.direction: Medium shot, animated and warm. Gesturing like describing a meal being prepared. This is Sage's strength — making complex feel simple through story.

scenes.dialogue: Every great prompt has five elements. Role — who should the AI be. Context — what it needs to know. Task — what you want it to produce. Format — how it should look. Constraints — what to avoid or include. That is it. Five ingredients. Infinite meals.
scenes.overlay: Five icons appearing one by one in a clean row: Role (mask icon), Context (book), Task (target), Format (layout), Constraints (filter). Each pulses as named. Final: all five glow together.
scenes.direction: Medium shot, counting on fingers naturally. Building rhythm. Landing hard on 'Infinite meals.'

scenes.dialogue: Here is the beautiful secret. You do not need to be technical. You do not need to code. The best prompt writers are clear thinkers — people who can say exactly what they want in plain language. If you can explain something to a brilliant friend, you can write a great prompt.
scenes.direction: Close-up, voice softening. This is the reassurance moment. Sage's warmth at full power.

scenes.dialogue: Ninety percent of AI users never learn prompting. They settle for mediocre. You will not be one of them.
scenes.visual: Cinematic: crowd of blurred figures fading to grey, one figure in sharp focus stepping forward into golden light, camera pushing in, dramatic depth of field

scenes.dialogue: Master the prompt. Master the AI. This is the most valuable skill of the decade. And it starts right now.
scenes.direction: Slow push-in to close-up. Final line delivered with quiet conviction. Slight smile.

scenes.visual: Warm amber gradient with soft light particles, creative energy, inviting atmosphere
scenes.text_overlay:
Next: Anatomy of a Great Prompt
likeone.ai
